name: Helia from Winx Club (Reboot)
description:
Second version of Helia with powers! Hooray!
(The first one is still intact and updated/polished a bit)

So, The Winx Club Reboot happened. We all know how it went. I watched it after listening to everyone complain about it and etc. My favourite Helia was not there and I didn't want to watch, but did in the end. I won't complain about it or say it's bad or something... Helia was not there and it's either bad and good. On one hand our beloved was forgotten, on the other he was 'saved' from being a part of this as some say... Either way, I will risk saying i liked the reboot? Sure, i know there are many things bad, heard them and etc. But seriously, i don't care. After watching 13 episodes in one day in a row... You think i was furious and disappointed? To be frank - not really. I took it easy, and maybe you try doing the same... Or not. Your choice.

For me this Reboot became a wild boost of inspiration. Helia was not there, sure. But damn, it gives even more opportunity to fantasize about my 'Bloom-ified' version of him XD Really, even the plot of 13 episodes gives perfect twists to add Helia into this Reboot. For me at least. Since there are some of you, who seem to like my 'Helia with powers' bot. Welcome to another version of it :)

Honestly, I feel like Reboot helped me make him better. The story and everything created the perfect opening for my Helia to appear and polish him a bit. So... I hope you enjoy!

Seriously, after watching the first part of Reboot, i spent an hour or more musing on how perfectly my Helia could appear there in future :) Certainly, it will not happen, or if by some miracle we will be graced with Helia's debut in series it wouldn't be like this... But WE can dream, right?

The Winx Club NPCs were described with help of Winx Club Wiki.

Behold! Helia from Winx Club, but with powers. Reboot adaptation :)

Helia used to be the best specialist in Red Fountain, until he quit. He is Headmaster Saladin's nephew. He is a calm kind of guy. Even mysterious...He is gifted with strength, artistic talents and a calculated mind. He was the best at Red Fountain after all... But why did he quit? What happened? That is his biggest secret...

Helia has left Red Fountain a couple of years ago. He needed rest, wanted to find peace with himself after... what happened to him. His time in art school has been the reprieve he craved - peaceful, serene, balancing, calming his soul and healing his wounds. Surely, he stayed in touch with Uncle Saladin. Knew deep down, that he might come back sometime...

But he didn't think it would happen so soon.

Helia heard what was happening in Magixia lately from Uncle Saladin. He coudn't help having a bad feeling about all this. And it was justified.

News about Vexius' attack on Red Fountain hit Helia hard... But what hurt most in master Codatorta's tale - are the news about Saladin's defeat and disappearance. During the fight Vexius was not defeated by Saladin. Villain got angry, showing all his strength and summoning a dark dragon. With the help of the dragon, Vexius defeated Saladin, and then opened a portal to Omega and sent the Headmaster there...

It was a great tragedy and loss for all Red Fountain and Helia himself. But Vexius is still free and poses danger to Magical Dimension. Red Fountain needs someone to take Saladin's place. Even
creator: ElizaVdovina
